title: Deephaven Plugin Directory
description: Defines the list of plugins shown on deephaven.io/plugins. Open a PR against this file to add your plugin.

name.description: Display name of the plugin. Don't prefix with "Deephaven", that's implied.

description.description: Short description shown on the plugin card

author.description: GitHub user or org that owns the plugin's repo

repo.description: GitHub repository URL (a path within a repo is allowed for monorepos)

href.description: Where the card links to: an internal docs path (starts with /) or an external https URL. Defaults to the repo URL.

image.description: Card image: a PNG committed to marketplace/images/ in this repo, referenced as /marketplace/images/<file>.png

registry.description: Optional package registry listing where the plugin is published

kind.description: Which registry the package is published to

minDeephavenVersion.description: Minimum Deephaven version the plugin is known to work with, e.g. 0.36.0

preInstalled.description: Whether the plugin ships pre-installed with Deephaven. Reserved for Deephaven-owned plugins; enforced by the validator.

tags.description: Tags used for filtering in the directory. "official" is reserved; it is derived automatically from the author.
